summary: PDC v2 Garmin Map Feature Testing Complete - All backend APIs (11/11) and frontend UI tests passed. The interactive Garmin-style map in Fiche 2 is fully functional with blue polygon, yellow tree pins, 4 tactile buttons, info box, and waypoints list.
critical_code_review_comments: ParcelMapGarmin.jsx correctly implements Leaflet map with OpenStreetMap tiles
Blue polygon with blue vertex markers renders correctly for 4+ vertices
Yellow tree pins with tree emoji icons display correctly
4 tactile buttons (Tracer parcelle, Marquer arbre, Annuler point, Capturer pour PDF) all functional
Garmin info box displays: producer name, village, superficie (ha), points count, trees count
Waypoints list shows parcelle vertices (WPT01-04) and trees (#1-3) with coordinates
html2canvas integration for map capture to base64 is implemented
PDF generation includes carte_parcelle section with tree list when map_snapshot is available
PDF has page numbering and GreenLink header/footer on every page
seed_data_creation: Used existing PDC 'KINDA YABRE' (id: 69d96ef8a99d36666f85edb2) with 4 polygon vertices and 3 trees
context_for_next_testing_agent: PDC v2 Garmin Map feature fully tested. carte_parcelle data structure: {polygon: [[lat,lng],...], arbres_ombrage: [{lat, lng, nom, numero},...], map_snapshot: base64_or_null}. Test PDC: 69d96ef8a99d36666f85edb2 (KINDA YABRE). PDF endpoint: GET /api/pdc-v2/pdf/{id}. Map capture uses html2canvas.

backend_apis: GET /api/pdc-v2/{id} - PASSED: Returns carte_parcelle with polygon (4 vertices) and arbres_ombrage (3 trees)
PUT /api/pdc-v2/{id}/step1 - PASSED: Saves carte_parcelle data (polygon, arbres_ombrage, map_snapshot)
PUT /api/pdc-v2/{id}/step1 with map_snapshot - PASSED: Saves base64 image data
GET /api/pdc-v2/pdf/{id} - PASSED: Returns valid PDF (15KB+, 8 pages)
PDF page numbering - PASSED: Multiple pages with Page X footer
PDF GreenLink header - PASSED: Header/footer on every page (verified via code)
PDF tree list section - PASSED: Arbres d'ombrage table in Fiche 2
New PDC schema - PASSED: carte_parcelle initialized with empty polygon/arbres/null snapshot
GET /api/pdc-v2/list - PASSED: Existing feature still works
GET /api/pdc-v2/stats/overview - PASSED: Existing feature still works
PUT /api/pdc-v2/{id}/step1 (other fiches) - PASSED: Existing feature still works
frontend_ui: Blue polygon with 4 vertices - PASSED (visible on map)
Yellow tree pins (3 trees) - PASSED (visible on map)
Garmin info box - PASSED: Shows Prod, Vill, Sup (4.30 ha), Pts (4), Arbres (3)
Parcelle waypoints list - PASSED: WPT01-04 with coordinates
Arbres d'ombrage list - PASSED: #1 Iroko, #2 Fraké, #3 Avocatier with coordinates
Mode toggle (polygon/tree) - PASSED: Mode indicator appears when button clicked
